name: PLIANT THERAPEUTICS INC
summary: PLIANT THERAPEUTICS INC is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on discovering and developing novel therapeutics for fibrotic diseases. Headquartered in South San Francisco, California, their lead product candidates are small molecule inhibitors targeting integrins, which play a key role in the fibrotic process. Pliant aims to address unmet medical needs in diseases such as idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF) and primary sclerosing cholangitis (PSC).
